project.name: Laboon Website (laboon.vn)
project.description: Website thương hiệu trà sữa Laboon - milktea & coffee shop

inactive_plugins_heavy.name: woocommerce
inactive_plugins_heavy.note: Not activated, safe to remove if not selling online

inactive_plugins_heavy.name: query-monitor
inactive_plugins_heavy.note: Dev tool, should not be on production

fonts_used.name: Roboto Slab
fonts_used.role: CSS loaded but NOT used on any element

gotchas: Adblockers block fonts loaded from /wp-content/uploads/elementor/google-fonts/ path because 'google-fonts' triggers filter rules
Elementor stores URLs with double-escaped slashes in _elementor_data: http:\\/\\/laboon.vn - need special MySQL REPLACE syntax
Deferring JS breaks Masonry/gallery layout - masonry.js, imagesloaded.js, gallery.js must NOT be deferred
Deferring swiper and elementor-frontend breaks Elementor Image Carousel initialization on mobile
Elementor Swiper height collapses if initialized while display:none (e.g., resizing window to test mobile). Always test on real device or refresh.
Nginx transparent WebP routing requires 'rewrite ... last' to correctly serve image/webp Content-Type for original JPG URLs
Performance optimizations (async CSS, defer JS) in functions.php must use is_user_logged_in() bypass to prevent breaking Admin Bar/Elementor Editor

Swiper FOUC: Trình duyệt xếp chồng các slide (display block) và hiện icon ảnh hỏng (do lazyload thiếu src) trước khi JS chạy. Giải quyết bằng cách thêm inline CSS vào wp_head để ẩn các slide (trừ cái đầu tiên) và tạo skeleton/spinner thay vì icon ảnh hỏng.

Swiper Infinite Loop with slidesPerView: auto will silently fail/disable if initialized when container width is 0 (hidden by Elementor animations). Always check offsetWidth > 0 before calling new Swiper() and use observer: true.
conventions: Child theme: kababi-child, custom code goes in functions.php
WPCode plugin manages header/footer scripts (GTM, Zalo widget)
Autoptimize handles CSS/JS aggregation and minification
Static assets cached 30 days via nginx (max-age=2592000)
Images > 50KB are converted to WebP via cwebp bash script and served transparently by Nginx
